name: Match Me If You Can
overview: Host Lauren Speed Hamilton, is helping to give 8 of your favorite reality TV stars a new chance at finding love. Using cutting edge technology, the Mango Matchmaker will help create surprisingly perfect matches and send our daters on a journey of date activities unlike anything you have seen before.

trailers.title: Match Me If You Can (Season 1) Trailer | MTV + Pepsi Mango
